Cruise Stocks Drop Amid U.S. Tax Crackdown Concerns: What's Going On?
data.description: Cruise stocks such as Carnival Corporation (NYSE: CCL), Royal Caribbean Inc. (NYSE: RCL) and Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE: NCLH) are trading lower Thursday after Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick suggested in an interview that those companies will have to start paying U.S. taxes.

data.title: Wix Is One Of The Best Product-Driven Growth Stories, Analyst Says
data.description: Wall Street analysts raise ratings for Wix.com after strong Q4 results, with expectations of continued growth and potential revenue boosts from new products and partnerships.

data.title: European Addiction-Focused Indivior Stock Falls As Drugmaker Warns Lower Revenues In 2025 Despite Q4 Earnings Beat
data.description: Indivior's 2025 outlook missed estimates, citing Suboxone sales erosion. The company plans $100 million in cost cuts, with $50M reinvested in Sublocade.
